title: Gashua Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Gashua with a Z-Score of +3.43. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Gashua has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The temperature is significantly higher than usual, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) of 11.0 GG and no Heating Degree Day (HDD). 
 The relative humidity is at 54% and the wind speed is 7.0 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the heat wave's effects.
